body.content: At MELT, we celebrate smoked meat with passion. Inspired by the tradition of Texas barbecue, our mission is simple: to offer you an unforgettable experience built around tender meats, slowly smoked for hours and served with generosity.  Melt-in-your-mouth brisket, flavorful pulled pork, house-made pastrami, indulgent sandwiches, or sharing platters — every bite is a tribute to the authentic flavors of the American smokehouse.  Whether in our welcoming restaurants, for takeaway, delivery, or at your events, MELT is the reference for BBQ in Paris and across Europe.

content.title: Melt
content.shortdescription: Le goût authentique du Barbecue à Paris.
